data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of mileage tracking for reimbursement. While the linked use case mentions tracking 127 miles, it does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm that this functionality is implemented and operational. The lack of specific evidence regarding how mileage is tracked and reimbursed constitutes a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or persisted state checks confirming the implementation of mileage tracking for reimbursement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API endpoint for mileage tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the mileage tracking functionality is correctly implemented and returns expected data.
